'''''Classic Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back''''' is a comic series that is part of the [[Classic Star Wars]] series of comics and re-publishes the original [[Star Wars (1977)|''Star Wars'' (1977)]] adaptation of [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'']].
